details: Implemented Spanish pilot architecture for 40 localized tool routes under /es/tools/{localized-slug}/.
English routes, English slugs, noindexToolSlugs, redirects, and tool records were not modified.
Added enabled en/es language config with locale, dir, indexable, slug strategy, and fallback metadata.
Spanish route map is keyed by canonicalToolId and includes slug lookup by localized Spanish slug.
Missing Spanish localizations fall back to the English same-tool route via getToolRoute.
40 Spanish localized pages generated in dist/es/tools.
Spanish pilot pages render index/follow; no Spanish noindex pilot pages were generated.
Spanish pages self-canonicalize to https://taptogen.com/es/tools/{localized-slug}/.
English pilot pages keep self-canonical https://taptogen.com/tools/{english-slug}/.
Spanish pages include en, es, and x-default alternates for same canonicalToolId.
English pilot pages include Spanish hreflang alternates where localized pages exist.
x-default points to the English same-tool URL for pilot tool pages.
Spanish pilot pages render html lang=es dir=ltr.
English pages link to Spanish same-tool pages; Spanish pages link back to English same-tool pages.
